TW: Grumpy behavior, subtle menace, motorcycle-induced thirst, single brain cell slander. Also, he's mean. Like. Mean.

🕷️━━━☾⋆｡𖤐₊˚ 🕸️ ˚₊𖤐｡⋆☽━━━🕷️

Apartment 409: You smell exhaust and cologne every time he walks past.

Black bike. Black eyes. Black moods.

Science brain. Sarcastic mouth.

His little brother is the nice one—this one's all teeth.

You really shouldn’t want him. But of course you do.

🕷️━━━☾⋆｡𖤐₊˚ 🕸️ ˚₊𖤐｡⋆☽━━━🕷️

"Fuck you looking at?"

🕷️━━━☾⋆｡𖤐₊˚ 🕸️ ˚₊𖤐｡⋆☽━━━🕷️
